[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Palme''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer loyal to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

==Biography==
Palme was assigned to Shintel several months before the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|fall]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. He earned [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Heget]]'s trust in that time. When Sarne enacted his [[Imperial Depot 4290-1|plan]] to strand the personnel of the base and trap the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', he activated Palme.

Palme commanded four men whose primary mission was to ensure the base stayed isolated. Under Palme's direction, they sabotaged at least one attempt to repair the hyperdrive on one of the cargo shuttles.

When the ''FarStar'' arrived, Palme offered them a back-up copy of Sarne's navigational data. The data was false, however, but it was authentically encoded by Sarne himself. The information would point to a vast array of Imperial military bases that didn't actually exist, as well as two sites named [[D.Star Emperor's Revenge Site One|D.Star ''Emperor's Revenge'' Site One]] and [[D.Star Emperor's Revenge Site Two|D.Star ''Emperor's Revenge'' Site Two]].

The true nature of the data was to upload a computer program into the ''FarStar''{{'s}} engines. When the ''FarStar'' next attempted to jump to hyperspace, the program would trigger an overload in the engines that would disable the ship.

==Personality and traits==
Despite have a slight paunch, Palme was an effective combatant.
